title: Parameters
summary: Defines the dimension, weight, and order parameters appearing in the OR coefficient formulas.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines the dimension, weight, and order parameters appearing in the OR coefficient formulas.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/Parameters.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The half-dimension shift (n - 2N) / 2. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and n of type ℚ, its defining expression is n minus 2 times N : ℚ divided by 2.
Parameter for the numerator Gamma ratio depending on s + t. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, its defining expression is -w₁ minus w₂ minus ORHalf Shift N n.
correspondence.leanType: def ORAlpha (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Parameter for the first-input Gamma ratio. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and n, w₁ of type ℚ, its defining expression is w₁ plus ORHalf Shift N n.
correspondence.leanType: def ORBeta (N : ℕ) (n w₁ : ℚ) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Parameter for the second-input Gamma ratio. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and n, w₂ of type ℚ, its defining expression is w₂ plus ORHalf Shift N n.
correspondence.leanType: def ORGamma (N : ℕ) (n w₂ : ℚ) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ plus I.b plus I.c equals - 2 times w₁ plus 2 times w₂ plus n minus 2 times N : ℚ minus 2 times I.b minus 2 times I.c divided by 2.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\quad \operatorname{ORAlpha} N n w₁ w₂ + b_{\mathrm{I}} + c_{\mathrm{I}} = -(2 \cdot w₁ + 2 \cdot w₂ + n - 2 \cdot (N \colon \mathbb{Q}) - 2 \cdot b_{\mathrm{I}} - 2 \cdot c_{\mathrm{I}}) / 2
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORAlpha_add_b_add_c {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + (I.b + I.c : ℕ) = -(2 * w₁ + 2 * w₂ + n - 2 * (N : ℚ) - 2 * I.b - 2 * I.c) / 2

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
